channel.title: Vlan on My Cybersecurity Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Vlan on My Cybersecurity Portfolio

item.title: Acme AeroTech Security Assessment
item.description:
Acme AeroTech - Security & Resilience Assessment

Prepared For: Acme AeroTech Prepared By: Titus Kamau Assessment Type: Cybersecurity Review Date: May 18, 2026

Organization Profile

Metric Value
Industry Aerospace parts manufacturing
Employees 75
IT Team Size 2 persons
Network Age 5 years
Redundancy None

Key Challenges Identified

Issue Risk
Flat, unsegmented network Lateral movement after any compromise
Default credentials on router, web, FTP, database Easy unauthorized access
No patch management program Known unpatched CVEs exploitable
No redundancy Full outages during maintenance

Vulnerability Analysis

Vulnerability Likelihood Impact Priority
Default credentials High High HIGH
Flat network / no segmentation High High HIGH
No patch management High Medium HIGH
Single firewall / switch Medium High MEDIUM
FTP plaintext Medium Medium MEDIUM

Recommended Network Redesign

6 VLANs:

item.title: Acme AeroTech Network Security Assessment
item.description:
Scenario

Acme AeroTech is a mid-sized aerospace manufacturing company with approximately 75 employees operating across engineering, administration, production, and management departments. As the organization expanded, concerns emerged regarding network security, unauthorized access risks, and insufficient segmentation between critical systems.

I was engaged as a Security Consultant to perform a comprehensive network security assessment and provide recommendations to strengthen the organization’s security posture. The engagement involved reviewing the existing network architecture, identifying vulnerabilities and operational risks, evaluating access control mechanisms, and proposing a secure redesign aligned with industry best practices.
